# Prasad's Dental Clinic

> Guntur's trusted aesthetic dental clinic specializing in painless smile corrections, cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, and teeth whitening. Led by Dr. Prasad in Pattabipuram, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh.

## About
Prasad's Dental Clinic is a modern aesthetic dental practice located in Stambalagaruvu, Pattabipuram, Guntur-522006, Andhra Pradesh, India. Founded by Dr. Prasad (BDS), the clinic specializes in painless dental treatments and smile corrections. With over 1,200 patients treated and a 4.7/5 Google rating, we serve patients from Guntur, Pattabipuram, Tenali, Mangalagiri, Vijayawada, Narasaraopet, Sattenapalli, Piduguralla, Macherla, and Bapatla.

## Services
- Smile Makeover (5-7 day transformation): https://prasadsdental.com/services/smile-makeover
- Painless Root Canal: https://prasadsdental.com/services/painless-root-canal
- Dental Implants: https://prasadsdental.com/services/dental-implants
- Instant Teeth Whitening: https://prasadsdental.com/services/teeth-whitening
- Porcelain Veneers: https://prasadsdental.com/services/porcelain-veneers
- Invisible Aligners: https://prasadsdental.com/services/invisible-aligners
- Dental Crowns & Bridges: https://prasadsdental.com/services/dental-crowns
- Kids Dentistry: https://prasadsdental.com/services/kids-dentistry
- Clear Braces: https://prasadsdental.com/services/braces
- Teeth Cleaning & Polishing: https://prasadsdental.com/services/teeth-cleaning
- Laser Gum Treatment: https://prasadsdental.com/services/laser-gum-treatment
- Wisdom Tooth Extraction: https://prasadsdental.com/services/wisdom-tooth-extraction
- Cavity Fillings: https://prasadsdental.com/services/cavity-fillings
- Tooth Bonding: https://prasadsdental.com/services/tooth-bonding
- Dentures: https://prasadsdental.com/services/dentures
- Sedation Dentistry: https://prasadsdental.com/services/sedation-dentistry
- Full Mouth Rehabilitation: https://prasadsdental.com/services/full-mouth-rehabilitation
